name: UNO CHECK CASHERS
description_short: UNO CHECK CASHERS is a check-cashing storefront in Houston, TX offering payroll check cashing, money transfer services via Western Union, and connections to payday and installment loans.
description_long:
UNO CHECK CASHERS operates a single physical location at 11103 Briar Forest Dr in Houston, Texas. The business functions primarily as a check-cashing service, allowing customers to convert paychecks and other checks into immediate cash without a bank account. The company is listed on iPaydayLoans, a loan marketplace aggregator, which suggests it may also facilitate or refer customers to payday loans, installment loans, and title loans through partner lenders.

The primary services offered include check cashing for payroll checks, Western Union money transfer and receiving services, and expedited cash access. The storefront operates Friday hours from 9AM to 7:45PM and can be reached at +1 832-831-8867. Customer reviews highlight fast service and friendly staff, with one customer specifically praising the speed of payroll check cashing and Western Union transaction handling.

UNO CHECK CASHERS distinguishes itself through its focus on customer service speed and accessibility. Reviews mention "very fast" service and "nice friendly ladies," suggesting a customer-service-oriented approach. The physical location in the Briar Forest area of Houston provides a convenient access point for nearby residents needing immediate check-cashing services without traditional banking relationships.

Prospective customers should note that while the company maintains a 3.5-star rating, there is at least one negative review reporting a refused check transaction. As a check-cashing service, UNO CHECK CASHERS does not provide the fraud protections, account security, or financial services of a bank. The connection to payday lending products suggests customers should carefully review any loan terms before accepting credit offers.
pros: Fast check-cashing service, specifically praised by customers for quick payroll check processing
Western Union money transfer and receiving services available at one location
Friendly and courteous staff noted in customer reviews
Accessible physical location in Houston's Briar Forest area
Extended evening hours (open until 7:45 PM) for working customers
No bank account or credit check required for check-cashing services
cons: At least one reported incident of refused check-cashing service with disputed reasoning
Limited to single physical location in Houston; no online check-cashing capability
Check-cashing services typically charge fees that reduce net cash received
Associated marketplace listing prominently advertises payday loans with 311% APR, indicating potential high-cost lending connections
No clear information provided on check-cashing fee structure or fee percentages
best_for: Houston residents without bank accounts needing immediate payroll check conversion
Customers requiring Western Union money transfer services in the Briar Forest area
Workers paid by check who need same-day cash access
Individuals sending or receiving international money transfers via Western Union
diagnosis: UNO CHECK CASHERS is best suited for Houston-area residents without traditional bank accounts who need immediate cash from paychecks or require Western Union services. The primary caveat is that check-cashing fees will reduce the amount received, and the company's prominence on a payday loan marketplace suggests customers should exercise caution regarding any credit product offers, which may carry very high interest rates (311% APR examples shown).
services: Fast cash access without bank account requirement
